So now I would like to talk about who Upwork would suit best. So firstly, you have to keep in mind that Upwork works from a reputation based system. So if you apply to a gig on Upwork, that business owner is able to go to your profile and they can see all the gigs that have flown through Upwork with you obviously in the past. you're not going to really get that much out of Upwork.
